family_movie_night.description: fast family-friendly picks for a seasonal anchor (DD.MM) using family-oriented genre buckets

recommendations_by_genre.description: top recommendations for a genre bucket at a seasonal anchor (DD.MM) (single-genre or curated bucket like RomCom)

recommendations_by_mood.description: mood-based recommendations using a simple mood→genre_bucket mapping on the seasonal popularity mart (DD.MM)

similar_movies.description: movies similar to a given movie using genre overlap (demo source movie is chosen data-driven at build time)

personalized_recommendations.description: personalized movie recommendations for a demo user based on recent clickout genre mix + seasonal popularity (DD.MM)

top_movies_seasonal_across_years.description: top movies for a recurring seasonal day+month (DD.MM) aggregated across all years

top_movies_around_date.description: top movies around a specific calendar date (±14 days), ranked with triangular weighting

top_movies_around_date_by_keyword.description: top movies around a date with a baked-in keyword match in title/description (simple text match)

daily_trending_movies.description: daily trending movies for a specific day (top 50 per day/market, unweighted)

seasonal_window_recommendations_for_date.description: curated seasonal-window recommendations for a baked-in demo date (genre + keyword scoring, not telemetry-based)

movie_details_by_object_id.description: movie details (description, poster, external URLs) for the demo source movie

search_movies_by_keyword.description: search movies by a baked-in keyword in title/description (fast catalog lookup)

top_movies_in_date_range.description: top movies in a baked-in date range (unweighted aggregate)

top_providers_in_date_window.description: top streaming providers by clickouts in a baked-in date window
